item.description:

📅 发布时间: Thu, 14 May 2026 23:39:42 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=292250

📄 原文内容:


◎片　　名　第八个家族
◎译　　名　Sekizinci Aile
◎年　　代　2025
◎产　　地　土耳其
◎类　　别　剧情 / 喜剧
◎语　　言　土耳其语
◎上映日期　2025-11-19(土耳其)
◎IMDb评分  5.5/10 (2027 人评价)
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt38781098/
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/37844375/
◎集　　数　5
◎季　　数　1
◎片　　长　40分钟
◎导　　演　阿里·阿泰 Ali Atay
◎编　　剧　阿里·阿泰 Ali Atay / 吉汉·塔莱 Cihan Talay
◎主　　演　哈鲁克·比尔根纳尔 Haluk Bilginer
　　　　　　赫再拉.卡亚 Hazal Kaya
　　　　　　厄康·吉赛尔 Ercan Kesal
　　　　　　莫蒙特·奥兹古尔 Mehmet Özgür
　　　　　　梅丽莎·丹格尔 Melisa Döngel
　　　　　　阿里·阿泰 Ali Atay
　　　　　　埃尔登姆·塞诺卡克 Erdem Senocak
　　　　　　塞尔坎·凯斯金 Serkan Keskin
　　　　　　卡格拉·乔鲁穆卢 Çaglar Çorumlu
　　　　　　吉汉·塔莱 Cihan Talay
　　　　　　阿尔珀·拜泰金 Alper Baytekin

◎简　　介

  With their invention of bulletproof thermal underwear, the Basmacıgil Family earns the title of the Eighth Family, one of the ruling forces of the world. Yet, as six very different siblings attempt to run the family business, their well-meaning but ineffective efforts leave their father Erol convinced that “no outside enemy is necessary."

◎简　　介　

　　In 'LOL: Last One Laughing,' comedians are forbidden to laugh as Philippe Geubels and Jeroom Snelders challenge ten Dutch comics to keep a straight face while trying to make each other laugh.
